name: PUMA BIOTECHNOLOGY, INC.
business: PUMA BIOTECHNOLOGY, INC. is a biopharmaceutical company that develops and commercializes innovative products to enhance cancer care. It currently commercializes NERLYNX (neratinib) for the treatment of certain HER2-positive breast cancers. It has in-licensed alisertib, an Aurora Kinase A inhibitor, for global development.
sellsTo: Specialty pharmacies and distributors in the United States
Sub-licensees in international territories outside the United States

exposures.sentence: We are currently commercializing NERLYNX, an oral version of neratinib, for the treatment of certain HER2-positive breast cancers.
Additionally, we have in-licensed, and are responsible for global development and commercialization of, alisertib.
